transcription: Ɛbɛyɛ mmerɛ sɛ yɛbɛyɛ scan ahwɛ honam a ɛsɛ sɛ yetwa yeni hwe no yie. Ɛna ɛtɔ da a ebetumi esi sɛ wobetumi enya ahoɔden na woakeka woho wɔ aberɛ a wonyɛ surgery
translation: Taking a scan to check which muscles need attention will be easy to plan further.  Also certain times there are chances to regain the strength and mobility back without surgery too.
reference: Taking a scan to check which muscles need attention will be easy to plan further.  Also certain times there are chances to regain the strength and mobility back without surgery too.
hypothesis: Tobi amrese GPS kan asɛ sɛ yɛpɛ sɛ nyɛɛ no dye. Na ɛtɔ da ebetumi efi sɛ ubetumi nya ho ende na wakɛka wo hɔ wo abrɛ aa won yɛ sɛdi.

transcription: Ɛsɛ sɛ woyɛ nhwehwɛmu wɔ viruses nkaeɛ no ho na wodi eduani a ɛbɔ mmerɛbo ho ban. Ɛkyerɛ sɛ ɛsɛ sɛ wotwe woho efiri nsa, smoking ɛne sradeɛ ho.
translation: You should just check for some other viruses, B or C and follow hepatoprotective diet.  It means, avoid alcohol, smoking and fats and Chat Doctor.
reference: You should just check for some other viruses, B or C and follow hepatoprotective diet.  It means, avoid alcohol, smoking and fats and Chat Doctor.
hypothesis: Asa wey enshichemu wo viruses enkaye no hu na wudi ediane aa ebo emrɛbo nuhupan Etrɛse asa we twɔbɔ efri ensa smoking enɛ swadie

transcription: Wɔfrɛ me Tanya na mewɔ abofra woedzi adapɛn dubaako. Ofi mber a na woedzi bɛyɛ dɛ adapɛn ebien no, ɔte dɛ ma ne yafun taa haw no, titiriw mber a ama no edziban ewie no.
translation: my name is tanya and i have a baby of 11 weeks, from when he was about 2 weeks old hes always seems distressed with hes tummy escpelly after hes feeds.
reference: my name is tanya and i have a baby of 11 weeks, from when he was about 2 weeks old hes always seems distressed with hes tummy escpelly after hes feeds.
hypothesis: Ofrem Tanya na mo agbo fra wizarda pendu ba ko, ofembura na wez be ede de peni bi nnu otu de mani e fun taa hom, tutu mbra amane zbe nevin.
